injuries.comment: The Stars said that Duchene is OUT for Thursday's (Nov. 6) game versus the Ducks.
The Stars said that Hintz is a game-time decision for Thursday's (Nov. 6) game versus the Ducks.
The Stars said that Faksa is a game-time decision for Thursday's (Nov. 6) game versus the Ducks.
Gudas did not play in Tuesday's (Nov. 4) game against the Panthers.
The Ducks said on Friday (Oct. 31) that Granlund is expected to be out for 2-3 weeks.
